reference: I have pain in the palm of my hand below the thumb. There is a vein that seems enlarged. It hurts to open a jar, button, or press my thumb back. I don't have any numbness. I had an X-ray a couple of months ago, and there was no arthritis present. My internist suggested I see a hand specialist. What could it be?
text: I have pain in the palm of my hand, below the thumb. There is a vein that seems enlarged. It hurts to open a jar, button, or press my thumb back. I don't have any numbness.
